_note: Plant -> country/name mapping for search_materials. SAP API_PRODUCT_SRV has no plant-country field and a plant-master service is not reachable here, so this is MAINTAINED CONFIG, not auto-derived. Seeded with the S/4HANA best-practice plants verified to exist in this system. Run the list_plants tool to see which plant codes actually exist, then add them below. Country should be an ISO 2-letter code.
